en: "If a prophet or a dreamer of dreams arises among you and gives you a sign or a wonder,
zh: “你們中間如果有先知，或作夢的人興起來，給你顯示神蹟或奇事；

en: and the sign or wonder that he tells you comes to pass, and if he says, 'Let us go after other gods,' which you have not known, 'and let us serve them,'
zh: 他告訴你的神蹟和奇事應驗了，以致他對你說：‘我們去隨從別的、你不認識的神，事奉他們吧。’

en: you shall not listen to the words of that prophet or that dreamer of dreams. For the LORD your God is testing you, to know whether you love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul.
zh: 你不可聽從那先知或作夢的人的話；因為耶和華你們的 神試驗你們，要知道你們是不是一心一意愛耶和華你們的 神。

en: You shall walk after the LORD your God and fear him and keep his commandments and obey his voice, and you shall serve him and hold fast to him.
zh: 你們要順從耶和華你們的 神，敬畏他，遵守他的誡命，聽從他的話，事奉他，緊靠他。

en: But that prophet or that dreamer of dreams shall be put to death, because he has taught rebellion against the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt and redeemed you out of the house of slavery, to make you leave the way in which the LORD your God commanded you to walk. So you shall purge the evil from your midst.
zh: 至於那先知，或作夢的人，你們要把他處死，因為他說了叛逆的話，叛逆了那領你們出埃及地，救贖你脫離為奴之家的耶和華你們的 神，要你離棄耶和華你的 神吩咐你走的道路。這樣你就把那惡從你們中間除掉了。

en: "If your brother, the son of your mother, or your son or your daughter or the wife you embrace or your friend who is as your own soul entices you secretly, saying, 'Let us go and serve other gods,' which neither you nor your fathers have known,
zh: “你的同母兄弟或你的兒女，你懷中的妻子或視你如自己性命的朋友，如果暗中引誘你，說：‘我們去事奉別的神吧。’就是你和你的列祖向來不認識的，

en: some of the gods of the peoples who are around you, whether near you or far off from you, from the one end of the earth to the other,
zh: 是你們周圍各族的神，無論是離你近的，或是離你遠的神；從地這邊直到地那邊的神，

en: you shall not yield to him or listen to him, nor shall your eye pity him, nor shall you spare him, nor shall you conceal him.
zh: 你都不可依從他，也不可聽從他；你的眼不可顧惜他，你不可憐憫他，也不可袒護他；

en: But you shall kill him. Your hand shall be first against him to put him to death, and afterward the hand of all the people.
zh: 總要把他殺死，你要先向他動手，然後全民才動手打死他。

en: You shall stone him to death with stones, because he sought to draw you away from the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery.
zh: 你要用石頭打死他，因為他要使你離棄那領你出埃及地，脫離為奴之家的耶和華你的 神。

en: And all Israel shall hear and fear and never again do any such wickedness as this among you.
zh: 這樣，全以色列聽見了，必然害怕，就不會再在你們中間行這樣的惡了。

en: "If you hear in one of your cities, which the LORD your God is giving you to dwell there,
zh: “在耶和華你的 神賜給你居住的一座城中，如果你聽說

en: that certain worthless fellows have gone out among you and have drawn away the inhabitants of their city, saying, 'Let us go and serve other gods,' which you have not known,
zh: 有些匪徒從你中間出來，把本城的居民引離，說：‘我們去事奉別的神吧。’那些神是你們素來不認識的；

en: then you shall inquire and make search and ask diligently. And behold, if it be true and certain that such an abomination has been done among you,
zh: 你就要調查、研究，仔細訪問，如果的確有這可厭惡的事行在你們中間，

en: you shall surely put the inhabitants of that city to the sword, devoting it to destruction, all who are in it and its cattle, with the edge of the sword.
zh: 你就要用刀劍把那城裡的居民殺掉，把那城和城裡的一切，以及牲畜，都用刀劍完全毀滅。

en: You shall gather all its spoil into the midst of its open square and burn the city and all its spoil with fire, as a whole burnt offering to the LORD your God. It shall be a heap forever. It shall not be built again.
zh: 並且把從城裡掠奪的一切戰利品，都要收集在那城的廣場上，用火把城和在城裡掠奪的一切戰利品焚燒，獻給耶和華你的 神；那城就要永遠成為廢墟，不可再建造。

en: None of the devoted things shall stick to your hand, that the LORD may turn from the fierceness of his anger and show you mercy and have compassion on you and multiply you, as he swore to your fathers,
zh: 那當毀滅的物，一點也不可留在你手中，好使耶和華轉意不發烈怒，反而向你施恩，憐憫你，照著他向你的列祖所起的誓，使你的人數增多；

en: if you obey the voice of the LORD your God, keeping all his commandments that I am commanding you today, and doing what is right in the sight of the LORD your God.
zh: 只要你聽從耶和華你的 神的話，遵守我今日吩咐你的一切誡命，實行耶和華你的 神看為正的事，就必這樣。”
